overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas showing the character CJ running along Verona Beach in Los Santos. The character moves along the sandy shore past palm trees, a wooden pier, and various pedestrians before turning to explore a crowded area and running back toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with palm tree line and wooden pier

agents.ego_description: running along the beach shoreline parallel to the water

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in green shirts walking along the beach

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending into the ocean with support pillars
dense row of tall palm trees along the beach edge
low concrete wall separating beach from upper walkway
tall modern skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the sunny beach with palm trees to the left and a wooden pier extending into the ocean on the right. The concrete retaining wall runs parallel ahead, with the Los Santos skyline visible in the distance. A few pedestrians are scattered along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area near concrete building with sunbather

events.description: character slows to a walk and turns left toward the water

agents.ego_description: slowing down and turning toward a more crowded section of the beach near a building

notable_agents.action: person lying on a red and white striped towel sunbathing on the sand

entered.detail: low rectangular concrete building with flat roof near the beach
person sunbathing on a red and white striped towel

segments.scene_description: The character continues running past the retaining wall and approaches a concrete beach building. A sunbather lies on a towel to the right. The character slows and turns left toward the water as the palm trees recede into the distance and the pier passes out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded beach area with many pedestrians near the water

events.description: character stops running and begins walking slowly through the crowd
crowd density increases significantly with many pedestrians in green shirts and red bandanas

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through a dense crowd of beachgoers and observing surroundings near the water

notable_agents.action: woman in red top and striped bag walking past the character
group of men in green shirts and red bandanas walking together

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water with gentle waves
hilly landmass with trees extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character turns to face the ocean and walks through a dense crowd of pedestrians, many wearing green shirts. The water and a rocky peninsula become visible in the background. The character pauses to observe the busy beach scene before the crowd density increases further.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach edge near palm tree line and sidewalk

events.description: character turns and begins running away from the water toward the street

agents.ego_description: running away from the crowded beach area back toward the palm tree line and sidewalk

entered.detail: thick palm tree trunks lining the beach edge
concrete walkway parallel to the beach

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the water and runs back toward the palm tree line. The sidewalk and street lamp come into view as the ocean exits the frame. The character runs along the edge of the beach where the sand meets the pavement, passing fewer pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastline that shifts from an open beach run to a crowded gathering before returning toward the city street. It begins with the character running along the sandy shore past palm trees and a wooden pier, with the Los Santos skyline looming in the distance. As the character passes a concrete retaining wall and a sunbather, the camera slows and turns left toward the water, leaving the pier behind. The scene then opens into a dense crowd of pedestrians wearing green shirts against a backdrop of the ocean and a rocky peninsula, before the character turns away from the water. Finally, the camera moves back toward the palm tree line, transitioning from the sand to the pavement as the ocean exits the frame and street lamps come into view.
